title: Voltaic
description: API for Electrodynamics, Nuclear Science and others of the Ampz mods.
body:
Voltaic is a library that serves as the core component of several other mods aiming to recreate the old Voltz-modpack, such as Electrodynamics, Nuclear Science, MFFS, ICBM, and others.


**Join us on discord:**  ![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/569969909380153345.svg?label=Join%20us%20on%20Discord&logo=discord&logoColor=FFFFFF&style=flat-square)  [Click here](https://discord.gg/bzH7CdQWRb)

**You should also check out my new Patreon:** [![](https://img.shields.io/endpoint.svg?url=https://shieldsio-patreon.vercel.app/api?username=aurilisdev&type=patrons&style=for-the-badge)](https://www.patreon.com/aurilisdev)

 **Mod Revival Process:**

As previously mentioned, this mod is trying to revive many abandoned but amazing mods. Listed below are some of the mods that are being restored and renewed:
*   Electrodynamics 1.21 ([Project page](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/electrodynamics))
*   Nuclear Science 1.21 ([Project page](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/nuclear-science))
*   Ballistix 1.21 ([Project page](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/ballistix))
*   Assembly Line 1.21 ([Project page](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/assembly-lines))
*   Blastcraft 1.21 ([Project page](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/blastcraft))
*   Modular Forcefield System 1.21([Project page](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/modular-force-field-systems)

**Permission to use in modpacks:**

Yes you are allowed to do this:

However, as written in the license (special permissions referring to distribution): 

```
You may only use the special permissions above, if you provide proper attribution to the Owner of this software "Sebastian Siljuholtet Johansen" (in the form of credit) and an URL to this Software�s official download page were the pack is accessed.
```
